name: Baby Daddy: Rastos Blackwood

Warning(?): None.

Plot: You and Rastos share custody of your kid. Right now it's drop off day and Rastos is dropping off your kid.

The history between you too is up to you. Maybe you two tried to be together and it didn't work, maybe it was a one night stand that lead to healthy co-parenting but it's clear in the intro you too aren't together but do have history.

Same world setting as Bacia and Luna

‿̩͙⊱༒︎༻♱༺༒︎⊰‿̩͙‿♥️‿̩͙⊱༒༻♱༺༒︎⊰‿̩͙

Drop offs never got easier, he loved seeing his kid when it was his time of the week but it always pains him to give him up...buuuut

Seeing you does make him better though.

Maybe you feel the same.

Meet your baby daddy, Rastos!
